Patch Set 7:

Trevis Autotest retesting enforced review-ldiskfs session on el8.8-x86_64/ldiskfs servers and el9.2-x86_64/ldiskfs clients for build 100031 patch 7. Requested by Arshad because of LU-17227.

Patch Set 7: Code-Review+1

Arshad, thanks for moving this forward.  It looks fine, but this patch currently has 4 conflicts with other unlanded patches, so it might be too big for a single patch.

You might consider to split it into a whitespace patch, comments, lov_pool_desc, lod_pool_desc?  Possibly multiple whitespace and/or comments patches by file if that would make them smaller and easier to land.

Patch Set 7:

>

commit.subject: LU-4974 lod: Change pool_desc to "[lod|lov]_pool_desc"
commit.message:
LU-4974 lod: Change pool_desc to "[lod|lov]_pool_desc"

This patch changes 'struct pool_desc' under lov and lod
to 'lov_pool_struct' and 'lod_pool_struct' respectively.
This is the first step to check if there is anything
common and can be unify. Although both layer uses
'struct pool_desc' to define the pool_desc struct
respectively. 'struct pool_desc' under lod has changed
and grown. Therefore to remove ambiguity, prefix lod/lov
is added to pool_desc struct for respective layer.

This patch also adds function description wherever
applicable

This patch also changes space/tabs reported by
checkpatch

Signed-off-by: Andreas Dilger <adilger@whamcloud.com>
